name: Salesforce
tagline: Platform-grade CRM for complex workflows and scale
bestFor: Complex multi-stage sales processes with governance
Custom objects, approval chains, and territory management
Integration-heavy environments (ERP, BI, custom tools)
Enterprise-scale with multiple business units

Your sales process requires custom objects beyond leads/contacts/deals
You plan to integrate deeply with ERP, accounting, or custom apps
You need multi-currency, multi-entity, or complex reporting
Your team will grow beyond 50+ sales users in 12 months
avoidWhen: Your sales process is straightforward lead → deal → close
Budget is tight and simpler tools meet 90% of needs
You lack internal admin capacity for ongoing configuration
Team is < 20 and workflows are standard

Budget for certified partner; DIY setups often fail
Expect customization and ongoing admin overhead
ROI comes from automation + data governance at scale, not just CRM basics
